channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Clarity and Congress's summer break: State of Crypto
item.description: All parties are still optimistic that Clarity can happen before the midterms, but time is really starting to run out.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
item.description: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

item.title: GERMANY’S LARGEST BANKING NETWORK ADOPTS CRYPTO. 🇩🇪 Germany’s Sparkassen network is rolling out crypto trading to millions of retail customers, per Bloomberg. Customers will be able to trade Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, and Cardano through - x.com

item.title: XPHERE Co-Founder took the Philippine Blockchain Week 2026 main stage for the panel "From Physical to Digital: Bringing Real-World Assets On-Chain" on how reliable Layer-1 infrastructure brings real-world assets on-chain XPHERE also served as Title S - x.com

item.title: Fake Mac Clipboard App Delivers New Password-Stealing Malware
item.description: A new Mac infostealer dubbed PamStealer impersonates the open-source Maccy clipboard manager to steal passwords and more.

item.title: trenches were retail slaughterhouses bc hella coins were obfuscated bundlegrapes, but crypto in general is most attractive to retail because of the ability to get supernormal returns on lowcap projects, & there are QUALITY projects that are being overlooked be - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE12TDFDX1Y0SENUM2o4VGVEdm5EdnRuX29JZlJWaDA0VUtRN2V5b3dzTDVuR2wzZVYxMGwzWlVLSkswTUE0eXpnUWlNTGRvUl84dzhJSUMxVVpFZGQ0cWZn?oc=5" target="_blank">trenches were retail slaughterhouses b…

item.title: Americans traded $571 million on Polymarket politic bets despite U.S. ban
item.description: U.S.-linked wallets traded $571 million in political contracts over the past year, more than any other country, even though the platform legally cannot serve them. The money leans toward the foreign-conflict markets U.S. venues do not list.

item.title: Banks have stopped asking if stablecoins belong in finance, now they're considering how
item.description: Financial institutions are racing to become the secure gateways for stablecoins as digital asset volume is projected to explode by 2030.

item.title: Collateral, not yield, will decide which stablecoins win
item.description: As yield-bearing stablecoins race toward a $50 billion market capitalization, the industry is optimizing for the wrong metric, argues Artem Tolkachev, chief RWA officer at Falcon Finance.

item.title: Kalshi and prediction market sector embroiled in mixed bag of legal fights across U.S.
item.description: Some of the many battles with state gaming regulators aren't going well for the industry at the moment, but it isn't without its would-be government protectors.

item.title: 🔥 NEW: Vitalik Buterin unveiled a new "Lean Ethereum" roadmap prioritizing quantum resistance, privacy, and scalability over the next 3–4 years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9YbXh4SXpXZEF5YnhkNmt5NXh4T19Kc0RIeGw0WUFRLUIzeDNIcFBESGcxNEhiTFd0aVREbDYyc2lOemZjYjU3ckFFTjJMVV9BNGgzSXBWNVV6VURNTWJOSm8zbHM?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NEW: Vitalik Buterin unveile…

item.title: Bitcoin is Digital Energy. - x.com
item.description: Bitcoin is Digital Energy.

item.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
item.description: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

item.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
item.description: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

item.title: Bitcoin’s greatest evolution over the next decade will come from changing less at the protocol layer and mattering more everywhere else.The base layer will harden.The capital markets will deepen.The applications will expand.The institutions will arrive.The wo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBZRlVnTTRzYy14OTc0bF91REJXSGlGQVZVWUlYcFpKdlZ4UzdEdGkwX0h3MEkydmFLZU54WG0yM1RyLXBRX3ZTR3RaMUxZV2FGdFlZemFQVWxWa3c?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin’s greatest evolution over the next …

item.title: Barstool's Portnoy plans to hold bitcoin down to zero after timing it wrong every time
item.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy said he will hold bitcoin all the way down to zero after buying near $100,000.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin shares top priorities for new 'Lean Ethereum' strawmap
item.description: Part of the Ethereum Foundation’s plan to make Ethereum more private and scalable is to introduce a new virtual machine, with leanISA and RISC-V among the top candidates.

item.title: I am contemplating selling some of my Bitcoin and going to Gold with the money. Looks to me that Gold is going to gain substantially on Bitcoin $XAUBTC - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1MSnZhMVlmRDVvQXpKMFIxamhsRlJpQ200TWl0NTE2dTJMcXJIZGZ5UGNMbElfVlo4NE53X1JlZFJ2UXhlbFQ0WGQ3blRpbV85R3dBdlh3TnRFU3g0TnBrU2gtQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">I am contemplating selling some …

item.title: 🚨 DATA: Bitcoin’s realized profit/loss ratio just hit a 43-month low. This is a level that has historically marked major market bottoms. - x.com

item.title: Moonbeam to pivot from Polkadot to Base, unveils AI agent framework
item.description: Moonbeam didn’t provide a timeline for when it would launch the AI agent platform but told GLMR holders to bridge their tokens from the Polkadot parachain to Base before July 31.

item.title: Vitalik Outlines Ethereum's "Lean Ethereum" Roadmap, Targeting Native STARKs and Quantum Resistance Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has outlined the long-term roadmap for Ethereum's third major evolution, dubbed "Lean Ethereum," with upgrades - x.com

item.title: ⚡️EUROPEAN BANK PUTS THE EURO ON ETHEREUM On the day MiCA came fully into force, Crédit Agricole launched EURXT, a MiCA-compliant euro stablecoin on Ethereum. The EURXT is issued by CACEIS, Crédit Agricole’s securities services arm, wh - x.com

item.title: Tokenization's next use case is personalized portfolios, NYLIM executive says
item.description: Thomas Sy, head of multi-asset solutions at the $800-million asset manager, says blockchain can enable complex portfolio construction that's not yet possible in traditional finance.

item.title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
item.description: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin officially reclaims $63,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFA0OFl6alBvbzVidElYeE5fTE9iNkZoNlozMHc4UWtRSVFnTHlTaVUxa3piMms4ZGcxdVFDaGVMY2d3eS00bm0yTWU5blJad1RHUzc4YlUxdDFYd1VXMFhIalJvZkJtdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin officially…

item.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
item.description: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

item.title: Bitcoin experts split over plan to freeze Satoshi's 1.1 million bitcoin as quantum threat grows
item.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao said Satoshi Nakamoto's bitcoin should be frozen before quantum computers can steal it. Not everyone agrees.

item.title: How ethical hackers with just a $3,000 server found a flaw that could've put $70 billion in crypto at risk
item.description: A critical flaw in the Aptos blockchain, which was patched, gave researchers a near-90% success rate at breaking a core security guarantee, with attack costs of just hundreds of dollars.

item.title: Two weeks ago, Ethereum researchers met in Berlin to continue charting the protocol's long-term trajectory, following along discussions with client teams in Svalbard in April. The updated strawmap is at strawmap.org, and I attached a picture of it to this post. M - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
item.description: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

item.title: Kalshi June trading volume tops $9B as World Cup fuels prediction markets
item.description: Kalshi posted a record month for trading volume as the expanded FIFA World Cup boosted prediction market activity, DefiLlama data shows.

item.title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
item.description: Andy Konwinski used Anthropic's Fable 5 debacle as exhibit A in the case against letting a handful of private labs govern who gets to do AI research.

item.title: Why bitcoin's disconnect from record-high stocks won't last
item.description: Researchers at Schwab and Hashdex said AI has diverted capital from digital assets while bitcoin continues to follow a familiar post-halving recovery pattern.

item.title: 🎮 The top blockchains powering crypto games right now @ethereum 📈 +41.9% Other 📈 +30.05% @solana 📈 +18.89% Find more: 👉 playtoearn.com/blockchaingame… - x.com

item.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows
item.description: The TRUMP token is down 96% from its peak, and 85% of secondary market wallets for WLFI are underwater, reflecting a broader downturn in the sector.

item.title: Inside the Trading Engine Behind ChangeNOW’s ‘Fast, Seamless Swaps’
item.description: ChangeNOW CSO Pauline Shangett digs into the infrastructure underpinning the exchange’s simple, streamlined frontend.

item.title: Europe led on crypto regulation. Now implementation must match ambition
EU moves to block retail investors from explosive boom of multibillion-dollar prediction markets
item.description: The region's regulators emphasized that a product's actual function as a derivative matters more than its commercial name or labeling when assessing compliance.

item.title: Bitcoin is Freedom I spent the last few weeks in my motherland, Vietnam. The country has transformed since my family escaped in 1978. It is more prosperous, energetic, and ambitious than the Vietnam I left behind. A young population, rising investment, and g - x.com

item.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
item.description: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.

item.title: 🇺🇸 HUGE: The USA has 2.8X more Bitcoin than every other country combined. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8xc2FETDlCYjJTX2lSVUsxdjNkWUpUM2VUa2ZfYldfRm9JVDVIVF9VZzQtbVcxckg0QUtpM18yWFNNX2lOUU5DZWF1RkxreGRXV08yRTM5MTJxZVc0RVlmblRLRUo?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 HUGE: The USA has 2.8X mor…

item.title: UK's bold new crypto rules promise to unlock global trading, but huge compliance hurdles still threaten the rollout
item.description: The U.K. FCA's crypto framework has been praised for prioritizing global liquidity and institutional adoption, but the authorization process is expected to be daunting.

item.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
item.description: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

item.title: Tim Draper says Arkham got Bitcoin wallet attribution ‘wrong’
item.description: Tim Draper disputes Arkham's Bitcoin wallet attribution, saying: “I haven’t touched it. Arkham has it wrong.”

item.title: ⚡ THROWBACK: Bitcoin's rough price on the 4th of July throughout history: 2016: $683 2017: $2,601 2018: $6,599 2019: $11,198 2020: $9,179 2021: $35,287 2022: $19,293 2023: $30,901 2024: $58,600 2025: $108,000 2026: $62,000 Happy 4th of July to al - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAwU2RXd2hRMkJkcGFqVl9FY3pTcHFmZUZpVHBEU3FjQUN6TXdpRzBseExCelZPME9TbFo1ZDFSWEJ1UVRhb2xNVWRuMXZfY25SOEdkTm9mYTdEaDFlZE10ejZYVzY?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ THROWBACK: Bitcoin's rough pr…

item.title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
item.description: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.

item.title: Bitcoin’s next parabolic run may need $1 trillion in fresh capital
item.description: This cycle, about $697 billion in new money has generated a roughly 689% gain, compared with earlier cycles where far less capital drove returns of upto 50,000%.

item.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low
item.description: Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan said the bottom is “closer than ever,” while a Swan Bitcoin analyst suggested investors buy now at a discount rather than overpaying later.

item.title: US law enforcement group drops opposition to CLARITY Act: Report
item.description: The Major County Sheriffs of America said it still wants the CLARITY Act amended to give local law enforcement more resources to investigate illicit finance cases.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ether extend relief rallies as extreme fear meets renewed ETF buying
item.description: Bitcoin and Ether bounced off multi-year lows as dip buyers finally stepped in, and the spot BTC ETFs saw a $221 million inflow on July 2.

item.title: Europe's Largest Fintech Revolut to Stop Supporting USDT on August 31 European fintech giant Revolut has notified users via app push notifications and emails that it will delist USDT. Users will still be able to purchase USDT until July 6. Revolut will stop acc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE02SlI3YmV3d3VKbUtIMmtiRkw2YWFFOEpMcUFVWXdfaWhFLTNsN3dZM2RkRlpsbXpoVG93Wm54WDJySDBfbGpkdjdGbXVxX3A0YzZNdC1Nc1EzbGczNEdncXpmZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Europe's Largest Fintech Revolut…

item.title: SOL rallies as Solana memecoins, prediction market activity surge: Are bulls back?
item.description: Rising interest in Solana-network memecoins and prediction markets was followed by a rally in SOL price. Will the momentum continue?

item.title: Claude Fable 5 Isn't Nerfed. The Router Is Just Paranoid
item.description: Did Claude Fable 5 get dumber? Two benchmarks, two wildly different conclusions—and one routing layer that explains the whole mess.

item.title: Senator Gillibrand Seeks to Ban Trump, Elected Officials From Launching Meme Coins
item.description: After President Trump disclosed over $1 billion in crypto-related earnings, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling for a meme coin ban.

item.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins
item.description: The restriction proposed by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand would bar members of Congress, the US president and their spouses from “issuing or sponsoring their own digital assets.”

item.title: This sanctioned Russian stablecoin claims it processes billions, but blockchain analysts disagree
item.description: A7A5 claims crypto data providers understate its trading activity, while blockchain analytics firms say the ruble-backed token's volumes have fallen sharply this year.

item.title: Zcash Ironwood Upgrade Nears as Developers Work to Restore Confidence After ZEC Crash
item.description: Developers say security testing has uncovered no new serious bugs as Zcash's Ironwood upgrade moves toward testnet activation.

item.title: 'Every Time I Buy It, It Tanks': Dave Portnoy Says He's Losing Millions as Bitcoin Falls
item.description: Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy says he's down millions on Bitcoin, but he's intent on holding this time—even if it falls to zero.
